overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city beneath elevated highways. The clip progresses from an industrial area toward a busy downtown intersection, featuring the iconic Arasaka tower, futuristic vehicles, and dense urban infrastructure during bright morning sunlight.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk next to industrial buildings with smokestacks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in same direction wearing yellow jacket

entered.detail: large industrial complex with smokestack emitting white smoke
massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover
metal barrier separating sidewalk from street level
chain-link fence along industrial property line

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a concrete overpass structure alongside an industrial complex. The camera follows the character walking past metal security fencing with a large industrial building and smokestack visible to the left. The environment is partially covered with diffused morning light filtering through.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway interchange

events.description: exiting covered walkway into open area under elevated highway with Arasaka tower becoming prominent
crossing street at red-paved crosswalk while futuristic vehicles pass on the road

agents.ego_description: walking under the elevated highway structure and crossing the street at an intersection

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: tall futuristic corporate skyscraper with illuminated signage
metal scaffolding structure alongside the highway
suspended traffic signal showing green light

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the industrial area into a more open urban space beneath the elevated highway. The iconic Arasaka tower dominates the left side of the frame. The character approaches and crosses a street intersection at a red crosswalk, sharing the space with sparse vehicular traffic and opposing pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street corridor under elevated highway

events.description: approaching bus stop shelter with increased pedestrian activity and commercial signage

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk passing various pedestrians and approaching a transit area

entered.detail: futuristic transit shelter with glass panels and seating
dense network of power lines and transmission towers
vertical neon signage for commercial establishment

segments.scene_description: Continuing under the elevated highway, the character walks along a commercial corridor with utility infrastructure visible on the right. A bus stop shelter comes into view and approaches on the right side, while various commercial signs including 'El Coyote Cojo' appear. The environment maintains consistent overhead cover from the highway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered transit underpass beneath highway interchange

events.description: entering covered underpass area with reduced natural lighting and enclosed concrete structure
slight turn to navigate through underpass while approaching transit station entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass transit area with other pedestrians moving in various directions

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in tan coat walking toward camera through underpass

entered.detail: enclosed concrete ceiling of the transit underpass with artificial lighting
entrance to underground or elevated transit station with signage
curved elevated highway ramp passing overhead

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered underpass beneath the highway interchange, where natural light gives way to mixed artificial lighting. The space becomes more enclosed with concrete support beams surrounding the path. A transit station entrance becomes visible ahead as the character navigates through moderate pedestrian traffic in this sheltered transit zone.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a stark industrial perimeter into the dense, sheltered heart of a futuristic urban transit zone. It begins under a concrete overpass beside an industrial complex, following a character past security fencing and a towering smokestack in diffused morning light. As the character moves into a more open urban space, the scene expands to reveal the dominating Arasaka tower before crossing a street intersection amidst sparse traffic and pedestrians. The camera then tracks along a commercial corridor beneath the elevated highway, passing utility infrastructure and signs for El Coyote Cojo and a bus stop shelter. Finally, the environment shifts from natural light to mixed artificial lighting as the character enters a covered underpass, navigating through pedestrian traffic toward a transit station entrance surrounded by heavy concrete support beams.
